title: koeleria gracilis var. missouriana
intro: Koeleria gracilis var. missouriana, also known as Missouri blue grass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Koeleria gracilis var. missouriana include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal and health benefits.
